title: AstralAzeta's Stone Armor
description: This mod adds a stone armor.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a09a96dfaf2790d9637119f1d805476c2b40c69.png) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/hFS6faY9tW) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/astralazetas-stone-armor)
This Mod adds the stone armor. It is the worst armor in the game, but you can craft it using only some stone, and it has knockback resistance. ![Stone Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2346261e7c01f9cbb65d0026ead28b138722c559_0.webp) Created using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).
